# Metadata Visualizer

## Overview

The Metadata Visualizer extension by Salesforce makes it easier to understand complex metadata by transforming raw files into clear, intuitive visual representations. This enables developers to quickly grasp structure, relationships, and configurations without the need for deep code analysis.

The extension is available in the [VS Code Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=salesforce.salesforcedx-metadata-visualizer-vscode) and [Open VSX](https://open-vsx.org/extension/salesforce/salesforcedx-metadata-visualizer-vscode).

Go to [Metadata Visualizer Documentation](https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/platform/md-visualizer/overview) to learn more.

Metadata Visualizer is enabled by default. Any developer with access to a Salesforce org can use the extension and visualize metadata in their code.

- **Navigate through metadata relationships with zoom, pan, and click interactions**

**Note**: Salesforce does not use customer data to train our LLMs.

## Prerequisites

Before you set up Salesforce Metadata Visualizer, make sure that you have these essentials.

- **[Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/download)**. See [Minimum Version](https://github.com/forcedotcom/salesforcedx-vscode/issues/6449).
- **[Salesforce Extensions for Visual Studio Code](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=salesforce.salesforcedx-vscode)** and its prerequisites.

## What can Salesforce Metadata Visualizer Do?

Use Salesforce Metadata Visualizer extension to:

- Visualize metadata generated by AI using Agentforce Vibes or from your SFDX project.
- Easily understand complex metadata through visual representation.
- See customizable views based on a selected theme.
- See key elements such as fields, relationships, and properties.

## Accessing Visualizations

For supported metadata files, use the extension to view an interactive visual representation.

- **From a file tab**: Open a metadata file and click **Visualize** in the upper-right corner of the editor tab.
- **From the context menu**: In the Explorer pane, right-click a metadata file and click **Visualize**.
- **From Agentforce Vibes**: When Agentforce Vibes creates or modifies a metadata file, a card appears with a **Visualize** button.

A split panel opens by default displaying the visualization. You can switch to full-screen view.

### Settings

- **Auto Load Visualization**: Click the Settings icon in the visualization pane and select the checkbox to automatically visualize files when you open them.
- **Plugin Visibility**: Use the Settings icon to show or hide visualizations for specific plugins.

## Bugs and Feedback

To report issues with Salesforce Metadata Visualizer, open a [bug on GitHub](https://github.com/forcedotcom/salesforce-metadata-visualizer-support/issues/new?template=Bug_report.md). If you would like to suggest a feature, create a [feature request on GitHub](https://github.com/forcedotcom/salesforce-metadata-visualizer-support/issues/new?template=Feature_request.md). You can also visit [Discussions](https://github.com/forcedotcom/salesforce-metadata-visualizer-support/discussions) for questions and feedback.
